title: Bootstrap CI Pipeline
description: CI/CD pipeline definition that any supported CI system can read to run all bootstrap checks (validate, plan, generate, drift, lint, test). Vendor-specific YAML is rendered from this canonical JSON by the renderer.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this CI integration spec, follows semver.

metadata.description: Human-readable metadata about the pipeline definition itself.

name.description: Display name for this pipeline (shown in CI dashboards).

description.description: Free-form description of what this pipeline validates.

version.description: Pipeline definition version, independent of schema_version.

targets.description: CI systems this pipeline definition knows how to render.

owner.description: Team or person owning this pipeline config.

pipeline.description: The pipeline itself: ordered stages, each with one or more steps that map to bootstrap.sh subcommands.

stages.description: Ordered list of stages executed sequentially by the CI runner.

triggers.description: Conditions that cause this pipeline to execute.

on_push.description: Branch globs that trigger the pipeline on push (e.g. main, release/*).

on_pull_request.description: Branch globs that trigger the pipeline on pull request.

on_schedule.description: Standard cron expression for scheduled runs (5-field or 6-field depending on vendor).

on_tag.description: Tag globs that trigger the pipeline (e.g. v*.*.*).

artifact_targets.description: File path globs to upload as CI artifacts (e.g. generated/, reports/, coverage/).

cache_targets.description: File path globs to cache between runs (e.g. node_modules/, ~/.cache/jq, .ai/).

environment.description: Environment variables exported to every step (key=value, both strings).

renderers.description: Per-vendor renderer hints: tells the generator where to write and which template family to use.

file_path.description: Path where the generated workflow file is written.

template_hint.description: Hint string consumed by the generator's template engine (e.g. 'actions/checkout@v4', ubuntu-latest).

permissions.description: GitHub Actions permissions block (contents: read, pull-requests: write, etc.).

file_path.description: Path where the generated pipeline file is written.

image.description: Default Docker image for the pipeline (e.g. alpine:3.20).

file_path.description: Path where the generated Jenkinsfile is written.

template_hint.description: Hint string for the generator (e.g. 'pipeline { agent any; stages { ... } }').

file_path.description: Path where the generated CircleCI config is written.
Path where the generated Buildkite pipeline is written.
Path where the generated Azure pipeline is written.

Stage.description: A logical group of steps, executed sequentially. Stages run in the order declared in pipeline.stages.

name.description: Stable stage identifier used by CI vendors (e.g. 'lint', 'drift', 'test').

label.description: Human-readable label for CI dashboards (defaults to name if omitted).

depends_on.description: Names of stages that must finish before this stage can start.

condition.description: Vendor-neutral boolean expression gating stage execution (rendered to vendor if/match). Example: 'branch == "main"'.

steps.description: Steps executed in order within this stage.

Step.description: A single shell invocation mapped to one bootstrap.sh subcommand.

id.description: Stable identifier for this step; CI tools use it to reference outputs and to chain steps across stages.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in CI UIs.

command.description: The bootstrap subcommand or external command to run. Standard values: bootstrap.sh, validate, plan, generate, drift, lint, test, schema-check.

args.description: Command-line arguments appended after the command (e.g. ['--target', 'all', '--plan']).

on_failure.description: Behavior when this step exits non-zero: fail = break the pipeline, warn = log and continue, ignore = silent continue.

outputs.description: Glob patterns of files produced by this step, registered as CI outputs and addressable by id.

outputs_format.description: Format of the primary output file (used by CI test reporters to surface results).

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout for this step; CI kills the job once exceeded.

required_tools.description: External tools that must be present on PATH (e.g. jq, ajv, git). Renderer injects an install step if missing.

env.description: Step-local environment variables overriding the pipeline-level environment.

StandardSteps.description: Canonical mapping of standard step ids to bootstrap.sh commands, documented here so renderers and humans agree.

validate.description: Run basic_validate / ajv against struct.json using struct.schema.json.

args.description: Default validate-only invocation (no generation, no plan).

plan.description: Dry-run generation: list what each target would produce without writing files.

args.description: Plan mode invocation across all targets.

generate.description: Actually run every generator to refresh generated/.

args.description: Full generation invocation; targets resolved by metadata.targets.

outputs.description: Default generated/ outputs uploaded as artifacts.

drift.description: Detect drift between struct.json and generated/ state.json (rule: struct-out-of-date).

lint.description: Run lint rules from drift-lint-rules.json against struct.json.

test.description: Run unit / integration / regression tests defined under test/ module.

args.description: Test invocation; renderer wraps with whatever test runner the project uses.
